display_text: Tinker Aghanim's Scepter: Upgrades Laser into Shrink Ray, reducing target's size, health, and maximum health. This counters tanky heroes and high-health pool strategies, making it a potent tool against durability-focused lineups.
search_text: Tinker Aghanim Scepter counter-tank high-health durability shrink ray laser upgrade

display_text: Tinker Aghanim's Shard: Grants Warp Flare, teleporting and rooting enemies while reducing their Cast and Attack Range. This counters positioning-dependent heroes and ranged attackers, disrupting their effectiveness in team fights.
search_text: Tinker Aghanim Shard counter-positioning range reduction teleport root warp flare
